summary: Frontend-only verification of the Industry starter pack feature on the Price list (/catalog) page. All six requested checks pass. Login as demo@ledgerly.app succeeded. Price list nav loads /catalog with the Industry starter pack panel visible (industry-select + import-preset-btn). Selecting 'Painting' updated the button label to 'Add 5 starter items'. First import: import-result showed 'Added 5 items.' and catalog-list rows grew from 9 -> 14. Second import (idempotency): import-result showed 'All items from this pack are already in your price list.' and rows stayed at 14. Manual add (material) with a unique description appeared in catalog-list (rows 14 -> 15). Zero console errors during the whole flow. Layout is clean at 1440x900.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogManager.tsx and /api/templates/presets are well structured: idempotency is enforced server-side by comparing existing description (case-insensitive, trimmed) and the UI reflects the added/skipped counts correctly.

Minor UX polish (non-blocking): the success alert uses role='status' which is fine, but a subtle color distinction between 'added N items' and 'all already exist' could help scan-ability. Currently both render as alert-success.
test_credentials: Owner demo@ledgerly.app / demo-demo-demo used via UI login; landed on /dashboard.
seed_data_creation: Imported the 'Painting' pack (5 items) into the Northwind Studio demo workspace, and added one TEST_UI_material_* item via the manual form. All persisted correctly in the price list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industry starter pack feature verified end-to-end via UI. After this run the demo workspace 'Northwind Studio' has the seeded items + prior 'freelance' pack + 'painting' pack (5 items) + one TEST_UI_material_* item, totaling 15 rows on /catalog. If another agent needs a clean industry to test, use 'plumbing', 'electrical', 'hvac' or any other unimported pack. Preview URL: https://8a1fcd27-2686-4210-bc8e-4cecf5167001.preview.emergentagent.com

measurements.second_import_message: All items from this pack are already in your price list.
